summary: All four requirements have been successfully implemented in TrustedElectricalContractorsPage.tsx. The BM logo background image, About section, Why Choose Us section with four features, and Ready to Start Your Project CTA are all present in the diff.

hallucinated_features.description: Hero section with background image from bm-enterprises-hero.dim_1920x800.png
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention adding or modifying a hero section with this specific background image. It only requests adding content below the names section.

hallucinated_features.description: Hero section with two-column grid layout featuring text content and a hero image (trusted electrical contactor.jpeg)
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest specifies preserving existing content and layout, but does not request adding this hero section structure with the uploaded contractor image.

hallucinated_features.description: Navigation buttons for 'Our Services' and 'Get a Quote' in hero section
hallucinated_features.reason: These CTAs in the hero section were not requested in the BuildRequest. Only the 'Ready to Start Your Project?' CTA section was specified.
